# Everyday Produce Market

> A neighborhood produce stand at 7300 Wornall Rd in Waldo, Kansas City. Open April through October. Waldo tradition since 1985.

## What we are
Everyday Produce Market is an open-air produce stand in the Waldo neighborhood of Kansas City, Missouri. We sell seasonal fruit and vegetables sourced from regional growers. Owner-operated by Konrad Pfeifauf since the late 1990s.

## Hours
- April through October
- Open daily, 8:30 AM to 6:30 PM

## Location
- 7300 Wornall Rd
- Kansas City, MO 64114
- Waldo neighborhood

## Phone
- (816) 942-6344 (stand)

## What we sell
Seasonal produce from local growers. The mix changes through the season. Strawberries and asparagus in spring, sweet corn and tomatoes mid-summer, apples and squash in fall.

## Important pages
- [Home](https://everyday-produce.com/)
- [About Konrad and the stand](https://everyday-produce.com/about.html)
- [Buy this house, eat free produce all season](https://everyday-produce.com/house.html) - special offer
